response.justification: The candidate is a strong full-stack engineer with deep TypeScript/Node.js and DLang experience, but the role demands 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows plus capital-markets/fixed-income domain expertise. Their only C++ exposure is roughly six months at National Instruments (2014–2015) and an academic thesis, with no SQL Server/Oracle work and no investment-banking or fixed-income background. RIDE Capital is fintech-adjacent but retail investing, not capital markets. This is a fundamental mismatch on both the mandatory technical stack and the required domain.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with strong software-craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a Windows-targeted IDE product
Demonstrated experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems and DevOps tooling
concerns: Lacks the required 5–10 years of professional C++ experience on Windows
No fixed-income, derivatives, or investment-banking/capital-markets domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; database work centers on MongoDB/MySQL
